case_title: PALLADINO & SUTHERLAND VS LABORDE ANDRE ESQ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,892.55 FILED BY PALLADINO & SUTHERLAND AS TO DEFENDANT LABORDE ANDRE ESQ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

CERT.RETURN REC.FOR ANDRE LABORDE.NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
